basic_details.job_title: Tarai Central Forest Division Rudrapur Working Plan Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Tarai Central Forest Division Rudrapur Working Plan Associate Notification 2026 has been released on 03 July 2026 on the official website forest.uk.gov.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the Tarai Central Forest Division Rudrapur Working Plan Associate Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Relaxation in upper age limit for SC/ST/OBC/Women candidates as per Uttarakhand State Government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Botany/Zoology/Forestry/Wildlife/Soil Sciences from a recognized University with 1st Division (at least 60% Marks)
qualification.details: M.Sc. in Botany/Zoology/Forestry/Wildlife/Soil Sciences from a recognized University with 1st Division (at least 60% Marks)

selection_process: Scrutiny of Applications Shortlisting Interview (in-person or online)
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.forest.uk.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 12-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Tarai Central Forest Division Rudrapur Working Plan Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Tarai Central Forest Division Rudrapur Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Tarai Central Forest Division Rudrapur Working Plan Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.Sc. in Botany/Zoology/Forestry/Wildlife/Soil Sciences from a recognized University with 1st Division (at least 60% Marks)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.forest.uk.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 12-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Tarai Central Forest Division Rudrapur Working Plan Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Working Plan Associate post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Working Plan Associate position is 12th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the division before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. degree in Botany, Zoology, Forestry, Wildlife, or Soil Sciences from a recognized university with a first division (at least 60% marks).

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Working Plan Associate role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/Women candidates as per Uttarakhand State Government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Working Plan Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000 per month for the contractual period.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Working Plan Associate post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Working Plan Associate position in the Tarai Central Forest Division Rudrapur.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Working Plan Associate post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves scrutiny of applications, shortlisting of eligible candidates, and an interview, which may be conducted in-person or online.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Tarai Central Forest Division Rudrapur, which is www.forest.uk.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as a photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational certificates with the application form.
